testcase.name: @BeforeMethod launchApplication
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.NoSuchDriverException: Unable to obtain: chromedriver, error chromedriver must exist: C:\Users\CHANDAN KONAR\Documents\chromedriver-win64\chromedriver.exe For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors/driver_location/ Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: driver.version: ChromeDriver at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverFinder.getBinaryPaths(DriverFinder.java:123) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverFinder.getDriverPath(DriverFinder.java:54) at org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver.generateExecutor(ChromeDriver.java:107) at org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver.<init>(ChromeDriver.java:93) at org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver.<init>(ChromeDriver.java:76) at org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver.<init>(ChromeDriver.java:72) at rahulshettyacademy.TestComponents.BaseTest.initializeDriver(BaseTest.java:66) at rahulshettyacademy.TestComponents.BaseTest.launchApplication(BaseTest.java:117) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1583) Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: chromedriver must exist: C:\Users\CHANDAN KONAR\Documents\chromedriver-win64\chromedriver.exe at org.openqa.selenium.internal.Require$PathStateChecker.isExecutable(Require.java:402) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.service.DriverFinder.getBinaryPaths(DriverFinder.java:120) ... 31 more ... Removed 19 stack frames
